def quick_sort(arr):
    def partition(low, high):
        pivot = arr[high]  # choose last element as pivot
        i = low - 1        # place for swapping
        
        for j in range(low, high):
            if arr[j] <= pivot:
                i += 1
                arr[i], arr[j] = arr[j], arr[i]
        
        # place pivot in correct position
        arr[i + 1], arr[high] = arr[high], arr[i + 1]
        return i + 1

    def quick_sort_rec(low: int, high: int):
        if low < high:
            pi = partition(low, high)
            # @viz
            window_stack.append(StackWindow(low, pi, high))
            reposition_windows()
            in_place(pi)
            # @end
            quick_sort_rec(low, pi - 1)
            # @viz
            window_stack[-1].shift()
            # @end
            quick_sort_rec(pi + 1, high)
            # @viz
            window_stack.pop().delete()
            reposition_windows()
            # @end

    # @viz
    window_stack.append(Rect(width=len(arr), color=(230,50,100)))
    panel.add(window_stack[-1])
    reposition_windows()    
    # @end
    quick_sort_rec(0, len(arr) - 1)
    # @viz
    window_stack.pop().delete()
    reposition_windows()
    # @end
    return arr

arr = [10, 7, 15, 8, 9, 1, 5, 13, 6, 2, 11, 4, 3, 12, 14]
low = 0
high = 0

# @viz
class LabeledArrow(Panel):
    "label with arrow pointing down"
    def __init__(self, label: str, color: tuple[int,int,int], **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.add(
            Label(label=label, color=color, width=2),
            Arrow(y=1, angle=Arrow.DOWN, color=color, width=2)
        )

class StackWindow(Panel):
    def __init__(self, low: int, mid:int, high:int, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self._left_window = Rect(x=low, width=mid-low, color=(230,50,100))
        self._right_window = Rect(x=mid+1, width=high-mid, color=(230,50,100), visible=False)
        self.add(
            self._left_window,
            Rect(x=mid, color=(50,220,100)),
            self._right_window,
        )
        self._windows = []
        panel.add(self)

    def shift(self):
        self._left_window.color = (50, 100, 230)    
        self._right_window.visible = True

panel = Panel(x=2, y=2)
panel.add(
    Array(cells=arr), 
    LabeledArrow(label='low', color=(230,70,100), y=-2, x=V('low-1')), 
    LabeledArrow(label='high', color=(100,70,230), y=-2, x=V('high'))
)

window_stack = []
def reposition_windows():
    for i, window in enumerate(window_stack[::-1]):
        window.y = 1+i

def in_place(index: int):
    panel.add(
        Rect(x=index, color=(50,60,200), alpha=0.5)
    )

content.text: At each step: Choose a "good" pivot in the array. Sort the array so that all the elements smaller than the pivot will be left of it, and larger will be right of it.
Recursively sort the left and right side.
The more the pivot is closer to the median, the faster this algorithm will run.
